question: How to open the swim platform of the boat?
content:
To access the wet storage compartment under the swim platform, open the rear platform hatch. Pull the lock handle up, turn the lock handle clockwise, and then open the rear platform hatch; the hatch and lock handle are shown here.<PIC>
To close it, close the hatch, turn the lock handle counterclockwise until the hatch is secure, and push the lock handle down. The engines will not start if the rear platform hatch is not securely closed.
ret: "To access the wet storage compartment under the swim platform, open the rear platform hatch. Pull the lock handle up, turn the lock handle clockwise, and then open the rear platform hatch; the hatch and lock handle are shown here.<PIC>\nTo close it, close the hatch, turn the lock handle counterclockwise until the hatch is secure, and push the lock handle down. The engines will not start if the rear platform hatch is not securely closed.",["Manual09_143"]
notes: The question says swim platform; the manual's matching opening procedure is for the wet storage compartment under the swim platform, via the rear platform hatch.
